name: Ex Libris-Pay-My-Tuition Connector
description: Connector between Ex Libris Alma and Primo and the Pay My Tuition payment system.

PMT_URL.description: Pay My Tuition portal redirect URL. Obtain from

PMT_LOGIN_KEY.description: Pay My Tuition login key. Obtain from Pay My Tuition.

PMT_TRAN_KEY.description: Pay My Tuition transaction key. Obtain from Pay My Tuition.

PMT_SECRET_KEY.description: Pay My Tuition secret key. Obtain from Pay My Tuition.

PMT_PMNT_DEST.description: The portal used to process the transaction. Options are: International and Domestic

PMT_EXT_INST_REF.description: The instutiton reference inside Pay My Tuition. Obtain from Pay My Tuition

PMT_PRIMO_PMNT_TYPE.description: The payment type indicator for PRIMO payments. Obtain from Pay My Tuition
